justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified that an appointment could not be booked for "tonight" and then successfully found an alternative time on the user's requested date.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent successfully found an alternative slot on the same day the user requested, even though the exact time was unavailable.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently handled the booking process, clarifying the initial date issue and then quickly finding and confirming an alternative time.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent clearly communicating the booking constraints and offering a suitable alternative.
